\begin{table}
\caption{In-sample parameter estimates with std.\ errors in parentheses (main suite). $\omega,\alpha,\beta$ are GARCH-family variance parameters; $\gamma_{\mathrm{lev}}$ is the GJR/EGARCH leverage term; $a,b,\kappa,\gamma$ are the NA-GARCH news-scaling parameters; $\nu$ is the Student-$t$ degrees of freedom.
